events.description: Bio-verify audit reported 3 CRITICAL variant registry errors; 2/3 were false positives (hallucinated corrected coordinates for rs6265 and rs1058396). Only rs1800955 alt allele was genuinely wrong.
events.impact: ~15 min wasted on verification of false claims
events.mitigation: Always cross-check bio-verify findings against gnomAD r4 API before acting. Added lesson to CYCLE.md maintenance log.

events.description: 3/12 expansion items (Pharmacogene CN, STRchive 2.0, Bergquist 2025 thresholds) found already implemented during execution. Inventory-before-expansion check worked.
